title: SCP-027, The Vermin God
description: An anomalous effect that spreads an infestation of vermin.
body:
The Vermin God adds a new entity. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-027, also known as the Vermin God.


SCP-027 is a phenomenon bound to a single host. Those afflicted by the effect become surrounded by swarms of insects and vermin that grow increasingly dangerous over time. The infestation progresses through three stages, each summoning more aggressive creatures. The curse can spread to nearby players or villagers upon death, ensuring that the plague of vermin never truly ends.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-027 spawn?

SCP-027 does not spawn naturally. Instead, you have to find a corpse that can spawn in caves like a normal monster. However, there can only be one host for SCP-027.

► Can I contain SCP-027

Yes, you can contain SCP-027. You will need a host for SCP-027 to contain it.

Build a 3x3 wide room with a large hole at the bottom which is filled with magma blocks, fire or lava to kill the vermin that spawns from the host. 3 blocks above the deadly trap should be a single glass pane or iron bar in the middle of the room, with no connection to the walls.

Place a boat on the block and trap a villager in it. Move the boat a bit to the side, so that it kinda floats above the trap, but is still on the block. The Villager needs to be the new SCP-027 host. To make that villager the next host, you will need to have the SCP-027 effect and die next to the villager, so that the effect spreads to the villager.

Now the upcoming vermin and insects from the SCP-027 should fall into the trap without attacking the current host. 

</details>



![SCP-027](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dfef6b23a94f5698b274d735fd72061d19ff379.png)

SCP-027 is an anomalous effect that progresses through three stages. In Stage one, SCP-027 will cover the host in flies and dust particles. Sometimes, it will spawn cockroaches and maggots. In Stage two, it will also spawn worms and centepedes. The Host will also noticed a slowness effect within Stage two. In the final stage, rats and spiders will also appear, while the host gets a slowness, weakness and mining fatique effect. The vermin spawned by SCP-027 will only attack the host of SCP-027 within a 20 block range. If a host dies, the SCP-027 effect spreads to the nearest player or villager within 20 blocks, continuing the infestation.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
